coaching_tips.observation: Head movement is high (stability score: 32/100). Moving head compromises balance and shot timing.
coaching_tips.suggestion: Focus on keeping your head still and eyes level. Drill: Practice with a side-arm thrower and focus on watching the ball hit the bat without head movement.

coaching_tips.observation: Spine is leaning forward significantly (166°). Balance may be compromised.
coaching_tips.suggestion: Your forward lean is pronounced. Check that you can recover balance quickly — if you're falling over after the shot, straighten up slightly.
